---
title: "UNIT 3 - Digital Epidemiology Tool: EPICOLLECT"
---

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0031.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0032.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0033.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0034.jpg)
